❯ Create a new file called
  notes2.txt containing
  exactly: hello-world

● Write(notes2.txt)

───────────────────────────
 Create file
 notes2.txt
╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
  1 hello-world
╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌
 Do you want to create
 notes2.txt?
 ❯ 1. Yes
   2. Yes, allow all edits
      during this session
      (shift+tab)
   3. No

 Esc to cancel · Tab to
 amend
